action.name: Execute
action.execute: xterm -e "systemctl status warp-agent-bridge x11-display vnc-server openbox-session --no-pager; read -p 'Press Enter...'"

action.name: Execute
action.execute: xterm -e "echo '--- Hostname ---'; hostname; echo '--- IP ---'; hostname -I; echo '--- Memory ---'; free -h; echo '--- Disk ---'; df -h /; echo '--- Uptime ---'; uptime; read -p 'Press Enter...'"

action.name: Execute
action.execute: xterm -e "sudo systemctl restart warp-agent-bridge; echo 'Restarted.'; read -p 'Press Enter...'"
